title: $154B in Illicit Crypto Flows Raises Stablecoin Questions
message_html: $154B in Illicit Crypto Flows Raises Stablecoin Questions ...
snippet: There’s an unavoidable paradox at the heart of stablecoins’ growth story. The tokenized assets promise to modernize money by making dollars programmable, portable and instantaneous, yet their most compelling advantage may not be technical at all.
